metadata.purpose: Warehouse-style lookup app for Advaning OMS inventory data.
metadata.source_rule: One normalized oms_inventory table; upload may come from OMS_inventory or masterlist. Reference-only columns are retained only when operationally useful.
metadata.classification_rule: Awnings are controlled by app_config.awning_classifications. All other sections filter the same rows.
metadata.relationship_rule: Series/class codes from masterlist create parent-child reference links from series groups to awnings, parts, fabrics, and accessories.
